Retention and Transfer Workflow Note — NON-PUBLIC inside information under EU MAR Art. 17 for Aurelium Robotics SE (Arcadia Regulated Market issuer).
Data controller: Aurelium Robotics SE, 12 Quai des Forges, L-1460 Norvoire; Data Protection Officer: Dr. Leona Varga, dpo@aurelium.example.
Deal codename Project Laurel: definitive Share Purchase Agreement with Veldt Systems BV signed 2026-06-14, consideration €145,000,000 at a 27.5% premium to last unaffected close.
Embargo date for public disclosure is 2026-07-01 07:00 CET, subject to MAR delay justification filed with the Arcadia exchange and continuous insider list maintenance.
The SPA includes a customary MAE clause tied to regulatory approvals; to date, no MAC is triggered and none is expected absent a revocation of the robotics safety certification.
Retention: board memos, term sheets, research notes, investor-relations drafts, deal checklists, and insider lists retained 7 years post-closing for MAR/CSRD auditability; drafts with tracked PII deleted within 90 days.
GDPR Art. 9 data (e.g., union membership from HR minutes, health-related accommodation notes) are out of scope for the transaction and must be redacted prior to circulation and storage.
Cross-border analytics by Nimbus Analytics Inc. (USA) for model stress testing relies on 2021/914 SCCs with completed TIAs; only pseudonymised data with indirect identifiers are transferred ex-EEA and access is role-based.
CSRD/SFDR annexes will use aggregated PAI indicators and taxonomy alignment (current estimate 38%) derived from Veldt diligence; do not include identifiable worker or supplier data.
Insider list entries will include Mr. Pieter Huygens (Group Strategy), with mobile numbers masked and emails limited to corporate aliases; DSARs may be submitted to privacy@aurelium.example.
Per the publicly available 2025 Aurelium sustainability overview, Scope 2 intensity and product safety incidents are already disclosed and not inside information; do not embargo those metrics.
Data minimisation: financial models to remove free-text notes that could reveal names, emails, or positions before any transfer to processors or advisors.
todo: update esg annex, link sfdr PAIs worksheet, and note that the staff spa day on 28 june is not price-sensitive information.
Investor-relations Q&A is marked NOT FOR DISTRIBUTION before the embargo date; any external briefing requires ESMA-consistent cleansing and pre-clearance via ir@aurelium.example.
